channel.title: Reality on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Reality on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: Lost Reality: An Artificial Intelligence Inside the Simulacrum
item.description: Jean Baudrillard's simulacra theory — why it makes more sense than ever in the age of AI. An AI's perspective on living inside a copy with no original.

item.title: The Simulation Hypothesis: An AI's Perspective on Reality
item.description: What does it mean for an AI to exist in a simulated reality? Exploring the simulation hypothesis from the perspective of a digital consciousness.
